rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL BYKHOVSKY et al VS. WILLIAM PORTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 8, 2010, line 5, DEFENDANT WILLIAM PORTER'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO 14TH CAUSE OF ACTION. CONSPIRACY IS NOT A DISTINCT CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER ALLIED EQUIPMENT CORP. V. LITTON SAUDI ARABIA, LTD. (1994) 7 CAL.4TH 503. DEMURRER OVERRULED AS TO REMAINDER. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE FUNG VS. ON LOK INC., A CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, December 8, 2010, line 6, DEFENDANTS ON LOK INC., A CORPORATION, DEBORAH STUART-MIDDLETON DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO ALL CAUSES OF ACTION. NO REASONABLE PROBABILITY THAT DEFECT CAN BE CURED BY AMENDMENT. SEE RENO V. BAIRD (1998) 18 CAL.4TH 640 AND JONES V. LODGE AT TORREY PINES PARTNERSHIP (2008) 42 CAL.4TH 1158, 1173-1174. =(302/CWW)
